prompt: Using the first reference image as the base, replace ONLY the golden coin that is floating/tossed above the character's right hand (viewer's right side) with the exact coin design shown in the second reference image (a circular gold-rimmed coin with a stylized blue 'M' logo and blue upward arrow on a textured blue face). The replacement coin should blend naturally into the scene with the same 3D stylized game-art rendering style as the rest of the image. Output ONE SINGLE edited image, no grid, no collage.
